creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
* Tijl Coosemans (tijl@coosemans.org) wrote:

> I recently switched email/hosting services. This patch updates
> email addresses and URLs.
> 
> * In all ports I maintain change tijl@ulyssis.org into tijl@coosemans.org.
> * Remove my name and email address from some pkg-descr files.
> * devel/libtifiles/pkg-descr: fix layout (copied from devel/libtifiles2).
> * lang/sdcc-devel, www/linux-flashplugin9, www/linux-f8-flashplugin10:
>   update MASTER_SITES.

We require maintainers to use address specified in MAINTAINER. Could you
please write from your old address?

-- 
Dmitry Marakasov   .   55B5 0596 FF1E 8D84 5F56  9510 D35A 80DD F9D2 F77D
amdmi3@amdmi3.ru  ..:  jabber: amdmi3@jabber.ru    http://www.amdmi3.ru
